title: Verify findings to durable store
goal: Route mini:verify findings to the .mini/findings/ store via mini findings add and make verifyContext treat the run report as optional, three-state-tolerant context (valid/corrupt/missing), so verify findings are no longer silently dropped when the report is unparseable or absent.

steps.title: source field in findings store model
steps.detail: Add FindingSource = verify|adversarial, FINDING_SOURCES, isFindingSource and Finding.source / NewFinding.source (default adversarial) to findingsStore.ts. parseFindings reads an optional **Source:** metadata line (missing -> adversarial); serializeFindings emits it alongside **Where:**/**Reviewed-at:**; relabel header # Adversarial findings -> source-agnostic (# Review findings) + comment naming both sources. ENTRY_RE untouched. Covered by findingsStore.test: source round-trip, default-adversarial on missing line, old-header file parses unchanged.

steps.title: --source flag on mini findings add
steps.detail: findings.ts accepts --source <verify|adversarial>, validates via isFindingSource (reject unknown like --severity), defaults to adversarial when absent, threads into addFinding. Covered by findings.test: explicit --source verify, invalid rejected, default when omitted.

steps.title: Route verify prompt + context to the store
steps.detail: buildVerifySessionPrompt replaces the ## Verify findings report-write and closed-phase memory-write branches with one 'mini findings add --source verify --severity .. --title .. [--where] [--body]' call per finding, plus the adversarial PATH caveat. Keep verify-items skeleton from the report as optional context; drop now-unused reportExists/memory wiring from prompt/verifyContext.ts as needed. Verify snapshot in sessionContext.test updated.

steps.title: Surface verify findings source in next
steps.detail: listFindings returns verify-sourced findings too; tag each surfaced line in the next prompt with its source ([verify]/[adversarial]) and rename the 'Open adversarial findings' comment/label (context.ts, sessionContext.ts) to be source-agnostic. Snapshot/test for the next block updated.

steps.title: Build green + full test suite green
steps.detail: npm run build and the full test suite pass, including any adversarial snapshot that round-trips the relabeled store header.

resolvedVerify: Run /mini:verify end-to-end and confirm findings land in .mini/findings/

autoCommit.subject: Phase 160: Verify findings to durable store
